name: Chicken Breasts Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten each chicken breast into an oval shape.
2. Prepare three bowls: one with flour, one with beaten egg, and one with a mixture of bread crumbs, salt, onion powder, garlic powder, and paprika.
3. Dip each chicken breast first in the flour, then in the egg, and finally coat it with the bread crumb mixture. Place on a baking sheet and refrigerate to set the coating for at least 30 minutes.
4. To make the sauce, lightly sauté chopped onions and garlic in olive oil. Add tomato sauce, oregano, and basil, and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Heat olive oil in a skillet and sauté the chicken breasts until golden brown.
6. Arrange the sautéed breasts in a shallow baking dish. Pour the sauce over the breasts, top with Parmesan cheese, and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top of the breasts. Return to the oven for an additional 10 minutes.
